brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone cross-source join transformation producing the core FutureProof product table. Reads career_outcomes (Gold), cip_soc_crosswalk (Silver), occupation_profiles (Gold), and onet_work_profiles (Gold). Joins career_outcomes to crosswalk via 4-digit CIP prefix match (co.cipcode = LEFT(xw.cipcode, 5)) because College Scorecard uses XX.XX format while crosswalk uses XX.XXXX format. LEFT JOINs to occupation_profiles on soc_code and onet_work_profiles on bls_soc_code to enrich with BLS and O*NET data. Deduplicates on grain (unitid, cipcode, soc_code) via ROW_NUMBER partitioned by grain fields ordered by stat_richness DESC, keeping the row with most non-null stat values. Computes stat_ern as 0.6 * cip_family_earnings_rank + 0.4 * wage_percentile_overall mapped to 1-10 scale. Computes stat_roi via piecewise linear interpolation from debt_to_earnings_annual (4 segments: 0.25-0.75 maps to 10-8, 0.75-1.5 maps to 8-5, 1.5-2.5 maps to 5-3, 2.5-4.0 maps to 3-1). Sets stat_res to null (Karpathy integration pending). Carries stat_grw from grw_score_rounded, stat_hmn from hmn_score_rounded. Computes boss_loans_score as 11 - stat_roi, boss_ceiling_score as round(10 - 9 * wage_percentile_education_tier), carries boss_market_score from market_score_rounded, boss_burnout_score from burnout_score_rounded, boss_ai_score null placeholder. Derives match_quality from join flags (has_bls, has_onet) at Gold time instead of using crosswalk Silver has_scorecard_match (which is FALSE for all rows). Computes stats_available_count and bosses_available_count as count of non-null stats/bosses. Derives overall_confidence from stats count and match_quality. Computes record_id via compute_grain_id with 'pcp' prefix. Promotes via idempotent promote pattern.

brightsmith_runtimeMetrics.cipPrefixJoinCoverage: 91.0% of distinct CIP codes, 97.1% of rows
brightsmith_runtimeMetrics.dedupStrategy: ROW_NUMBER OVER (PARTITION BY unitid, cipcode, soc_code ORDER BY stat_richness DESC)

documentation.description: Transform and join 4 Gold tables + 1 Silver crosswalk into the consumable.program_career_paths unified data product. This is the core FutureProof query table: school + major -> career outcomes with pentagon stats, boss fight scores, and confidence tiers. Uses 4-digit CIP prefix join (LEFT(crosswalk.cipcode, 5)) to bridge College Scorecard's XX.XX format to crosswalk's XX.XXXX format, achieving 91% CIP code coverage. LEFT JOINs to BLS and O*NET for occupation enrichment. Deduplicates grain (unitid, cipcode, soc_code) keeping richest stat row. Computes ERN (blended earnings/wage percentile), ROI (piecewise from debt-to-earnings), carries GRW and HMN from upstream Gold, sets RES placeholder null. Computes boss scores: Loans (inverse of ROI), Ceiling (inverse of wage percentile within education tier), carries Market and Burnout, AI placeholder null. Derives match_quality, stats/bosses available counts, and overall_confidence at Gold time.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash via compute_grain_id(row, ['unitid', 'cipcode', 'soc_code'], prefix='pcp'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'pcp' prefix.

unitid.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. IPEDS institution ID.

cipcode.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. Retains the 4-digit XX.XX format from College Scorecard (not the 6-digit crosswalk format).

cip_family.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. 2-digit CIP family code.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Brought in via INNER JOIN from crosswalk. The join key is career_outcomes.cipcode = LEFT(crosswalk.cipcode, 5) -- 4-digit CIP prefix match. One Scorecard CIP may match multiple crosswalk entries, each bringing a different SOC code.

occupation_title.transformationDescription: COALESCE(occupation_profiles.occupation_title, onet_work_profiles.primary_title, crosswalk.soc_title, 'Unknown'). Prefers BLS title, falls back to O*NET, then crosswalk, then literal 'Unknown'.

soc_major_group_name.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles via LEFT JOIN on soc_code. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

stat_ern.transformationDescription: Earning Power stat (1-10). Computed as round_half_up(1.0 + 9.0 * (0.6 * cip_family_earnings_rank + 0.4 * wage_percentile_overall)). Blends 60% program-level earnings rank (school-specific from Scorecard) with 40% occupation-level wage percentile (career-level from BLS). Null if either input is null.

stat_roi.transformationDescription: Return on Investment stat (1-10). Piecewise linear interpolation from debt_to_earnings_annual: <=0.25 -> 10, 0.25-0.75 -> 10-8, 0.75-1.5 -> 8-5, 1.5-2.5 -> 5-3, 2.5-4.0 -> 3-1, >4.0 -> 1. Uses round_half_up() for DuckDB-consistent rounding. Null if debt_to_earnings_annual is null.

stat_res.transformationDescription: AI Resilience stat placeholder. Set to null for all rows. Requires Karpathy AI exposure scores and task-level AI scoring (separate spec). Will be populated post-hackathon.

stat_grw.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles.grw_score_rounded via LEFT JOIN. Growth stat (1-10) computed upstream in BLS Gold. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

stat_hmn.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles.hmn_score_rounded via LEFT JOIN. Human Edge stat (1-10) computed upstream in O*NET Gold. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

boss_ai_score.transformationDescription: AI boss fight placeholder. Set to null for all rows. Same dependency as stat_res -- requires Karpathy integration.

boss_loans_score.transformationDescription: Student Loans boss score (1-10). Computed as 11 - stat_roi. Inverse of ROI: ROI of 10 -> Loans boss is 1 (easy fight); ROI of 1 -> Loans boss is 10 (devastating). Null if stat_roi is null.

boss_market_score.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles.market_score_rounded via LEFT JOIN. Market boss score (1-10) computed upstream in BLS Gold. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

boss_burnout_score.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles.burnout_score_rounded via LEFT JOIN. Burnout boss score (1-10) computed upstream in O*NET Gold. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

boss_ceiling_score.transformationDescription: Ceiling boss score (1-10). Computed as round_half_up(10.0 - 9.0 * wage_percentile_education_tier). Low earner within education tier -> strong boss (ceiling is real, score near 10). High earner -> weak boss (already pushed past it, score near 1). Null if wage_percentile_education_tier is null.

earnings_1yr_median.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. Median earnings 1 year post-graduation.

earnings_1yr_p25.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. 25th percentile earnings (effort slider: low focus).

earnings_1yr_p75.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. 75th percentile earnings (effort slider: high focus).

debt_median.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. Median cumulative debt at graduation.

debt_to_earnings_annual.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_outcomes. Key affordability ratio used as input to stat_roi and boss_loans_score derivations.

confidence_tier_program.transformationDescription: Renamed from career_outcomes.confidence_tier to confidence_tier_program to distinguish from the Gold-level overall_confidence field. No value transformation.

median_annual_wage.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles via LEFT JOIN. Occupation-level median wage. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

growth_category.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles via LEFT JOIN. BLS growth tier (declining_fast through booming). Null if BLS join did not succeed.

employment_current.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles via LEFT JOIN. Current employment count. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

education_level_name.transformationDescription: Direct carry from occupation_profiles via LEFT JOIN. Typical education requirement. Null if BLS join did not succeed.

top_5_activities.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles via LEFT JOIN. JSON array of top 5 work activities. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

top_human_activities.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles via LEFT JOIN. JSON array of top human-edge activities. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

burnout_drivers.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles via LEFT JOIN. JSON array of top burnout contributors. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

time_pressure.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles via LEFT JOIN. Individual burnout element score. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

work_hours.transformationDescription: Direct carry from onet_work_profiles via LEFT JOIN. Duration of typical work week. Null if O*NET join did not succeed.

match_quality.transformationDescription: Derived at Gold time from LEFT JOIN success flags. CASE: both BLS and O*NET joined -> 'full'; BLS only -> 'partial_no_onet'; O*NET only -> 'partial_no_bls'; neither -> 'scorecard_only'. Intentionally does NOT use crosswalk Silver has_scorecard_match flag (which is FALSE for all 5,903 rows due to strict 6-digit matching). Instead derives from actual join results.

stats_available_count.transformationDescription: Count of non-null values among the 5 pentagon stats (stat_ern, stat_roi, stat_res, stat_grw, stat_hmn). Range 0-5. stat_res is always null so maximum in current data is 4. Required field, never null.

bosses_available_count.transformationDescription: Count of non-null values among the 5 boss scores (boss_ai_score, boss_loans_score, boss_market_score, boss_burnout_score, boss_ceiling_score). Range 0-5. boss_ai_score is always null so maximum in current data is 4. Required field, never null.

overall_confidence.transformationDescription: Tiered confidence label derived from stats_available_count and match_quality. 'high' if stats_available_count >= 4 AND match_quality = 'full'. 'medium' if stats_available_count >= 2 AND match_quality contains 'partial'. 'low' otherwise (stats_available_count < 2 OR match_quality = 'scorecard_only'). Required field, never null.

promoted_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Gold promotion time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Set after all derivations are complete.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone transition enrichment producing career branch data. Reads career_transitions (Gold), occupation_profiles (Gold), and onet_work_profiles (Gold). For each career transition pair (soc_code, related_soc_code), looks up both source and related occupation stats from BLS (grw_score_rounded, median_annual_wage) and O*NET (hmn_score_rounded, burnout_score_rounded) using dict lookups keyed by soc_code/bls_soc_code. Computes 4 delta fields (grw_delta, hmn_delta, burnout_delta, wage_delta) as related minus source, null-safe (null if either side is null). Derives branch_has_full_data as True when related occupation has both BLS grw and O*NET hmn data. 1:1 enrichment of career_transitions (no fan-out). Computes record_id via compute_grain_id with 'br' prefix. Promotes via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Enrich consumable.career_transitions with full stat profiles for both source and target occupations, producing consumable.career_branches. For each transition pair, looks up GRW, HMN, Burnout, and wage stats from occupation_profiles and onet_work_profiles for both the source occupation and the related (branch target) occupation. Computes stat deltas (related - source) to show how branching affects each dimension. Derives branch_has_full_data flag indicating whether the branch target has complete BLS + O*NET coverage. 1:1 with career_transitions (no fan-out or filtering). Enables the frontend to render branch trees with full pentagon stats without additional queries.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash via compute_grain_id(row, ['soc_code', 'related_soc_code'], prefix='br'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'br' prefix.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Renamed from career_transitions.bls_soc_code to soc_code. Source occupation SOC code.

related_soc_code.transformationDescription: Renamed from career_transitions.related_bls_soc_code to related_soc_code. Branch target occupation SOC code.

best_index.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_transitions. Similarity rank (1 = most similar).

relatedness_tier.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_transitions. Primary-Short / Primary-Long / Supplemental.

is_primary.transformationDescription: Direct carry from career_transitions. True for top 10 related occupations.

source_grw.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by soc_code (source occupation). Null if source occupation not found in BLS data.

source_hmn.transformationDescription: Looked up from onet_work_profiles dict keyed by bls_soc_code (source occupation). Null if source occupation not found in O*NET data.

source_burnout.transformationDescription: Looked up from onet_work_profiles dict keyed by bls_soc_code (source occupation). Null if source occupation not found in O*NET data.

source_wage.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by soc_code (source occupation). Null if source occupation not found in BLS data.

related_grw.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by related_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target occupation not found in BLS data.

related_hmn.transformationDescription: Looked up from onet_work_profiles dict keyed by bls_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target occupation not found in O*NET data.

related_burnout.transformationDescription: Looked up from onet_work_profiles dict keyed by bls_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target occupation not found in O*NET data.

related_wage.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by related_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target occupation not found in BLS data.

related_growth_category.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by related_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target not found in BLS data.

related_education_level.transformationDescription: Looked up from occupation_profiles dict keyed by related_soc_code (branch target occupation). Null if target not found in BLS data.

grw_delta.transformationDescription: related_grw - source_grw. Positive = branch target grows faster. Null if either source_grw or related_grw is null.

hmn_delta.transformationDescription: related_hmn - source_hmn. Positive = branch target has more human edge. Null if either side is null.

burnout_delta.transformationDescription: related_burnout - source_burnout. Positive = branch target has more burnout risk. Null if either side is null.

wage_delta.transformationDescription: related_wage - source_wage. Positive = branch target pays more. Null if either side is null.

branch_has_full_data.transformationDescription: True if the related (branch target) occupation has both BLS data (related_grw is not null) and O*NET data (related_hmn is not null). Required field, never null.

promoted_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Gold promotion time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Same timestamp as Table 1 (both tables promoted in the same transform() call).
